decisions.briefing: Markets were mixed today — S&P 500 flat, NASDAQ off 0.6% with light tech selling. With only $477 in cash (just below the $500 buy threshold), there's no new position to open today. Semiconductor names dominated the screener with exceptional breadth — MU, AMAT, GLW, TER, ONTO all scoring 95 — but capital constraints mean we sit tight and let existing positions work. No stop-loss concerns flagged; current holdings remain within acceptable range.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities were split on June 25, 2026, with the S&P 500 nearly flat while the NASDAQ slipped 0.6% as broad technology names faced mild profit-taking. Semiconductor stocks stood out as a bright spot, with a wide swath of chip names — including AMAT, MU, GLW, and TER — all showing bullish MACD crossovers and prices well above their 20-day moving averages, suggesting institutional rotation into the chip sector continues. The neutral overall tone implies no macro shock drove the session; this was more a quiet consolidation day than a directional move.
market_education.summary_zh: 2026年6月25日，美股走勢分化，標普500指數幾乎收平，而納斯達克指數則小跌0.6%，科技板塊面臨輕微獲利回吐壓力。半導體類股表現亮眼，包括AMAT、MU、GLW及TER在內的多檔晶片股，MACD均出現看多交叉且股價明顯高於20日均線，顯示機構資金持續輪動進入半導體板塊。整體市場氣氛維持中性，本次調整更像是平靜的盤整，而非宏觀因素驅動的方向性走勢。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Sector rotation is when investors move money out of one part of the market and into another — chasing stronger momentum or better fundamentals. Today's session showed this clearly: the broad NASDAQ dipped, yet semiconductor stocks maintained top-tier momentum scores across the board. This is a classic sign that institutional money is selectively buying chip stocks while trimming exposure to the wider tech index.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 板塊輪動是指投資者將資金從市場的某一板塊移往另一板塊的現象，目的是追逐更強的動能或更佳的基本面。今日市場清楚呈現這一規律：納斯達克大盤下跌，但半導體個股的動能評分卻全面維持高位。這是機構資金選擇性買入晶片股、同時削減廣泛科技指數部位的經典訊號。
